**Summary:**
A simple Tetris-like JavaScript game project has been scaffolded. The project includes:
- index.html: Game UI and canvas
- main.js: Game logic (piece movement, rotation, line clearing, scoring)
- style.css: Basic styling
- .github/copilot-instructions.md: Project checklist

Next steps: Test the game in a browser and update documentation as needed.
